begining_of_contract.text: วันที่ยื่น

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) AS requestment_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) AS membername , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark , sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value , sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first int_approx, sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share , sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit , sc_lon_m_loan_request.contract_code , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) AS member_control_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first, TRUNC( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date)/12 ) AS age_MEM_LOAN, coalesce(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long,'ไม่ได้ระบุ') position_long, sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_com_m_branch, security_users, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_br = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = security_users.names ) AND ( sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type IN ('สส','สท')) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code )
AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '2' ) /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_loan_req_norm_mol_wait_nest_coll_m.sql: select sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name , TRUNC( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date)/12 )as age_live , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_loan_balance_by_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as loan_bal ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_ucf_position , sc_mem_m_membership_registered left join sc_mem_m_member_work_info on sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0}

r_ktm_loan_req_norm_mol_wait_nest_old_lo.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.sequence_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )
